summary: The session focused on steps homeowners can take when their building work is overrunning, emphasizing communication with builders, reviewing contracts, and seeking legal advice. The user requested specific sections of an article, including a 100-word piece on communicating with builders and a 150-word section on options available to homeowners.
facts: The user requested a 100-word section on "Communicate with the Builder" regarding building work overruns. The user requested a 150-word section on "Options Available to Homeowners" concerning building work overruns. The assistant provided steps for homeowners to address building work overruns, including communication, contract review, legal advice, mediation, documentation, and maintaining composure. The assistant outlined options for homeowners facing building delays, including negotiating timelines, terminating contracts, seeking compensation for losses, and claiming damages for breach of contract.
